title: New Matter Field Extraction ‚Äî Output Schema (ACT-023)
description: Output schema for sprk_analysisaction sprk_actioncode='ACT-023' (sprk_name='New Matter Field Extraction'), referenced by playbook PB-008 'Create New Matter Pre-Fill' (id 2d660cad-d418-f111-8343-7ced8d1dc988). R6 task 034 (D-B-05) ‚Äî populates sprk_outputschemajson on the existing action row. NFR-07 BINDING: the schema MIRRORS VERBATIM the existing wizard consumer contract defined by the AiPreFillResult internal DTO in src/server/api/Sprk.Bff.Api/Services/Workspace/MatterPreFillService.cs (lines 678-703) and consumed by the useAiPrefill React hook in src/client/shared/Spaarke.UI.Components/src/hooks/useAiPrefill.ts. The pre-fill flow signatures, the 45s timeout in MatterPreFillService.ExtractFieldsViaPlaybookAsync (line 311), and the useAiPrefill hook contract REMAIN UNCHANGED ‚Äî this schema is metadata-only (declares the same data shape that already flows through the pipeline today). All fields are nullable to match the existing behavior: the LLM may omit a field when the source document does not contain it; the wizard's BuildPreFillResponse (line 621-647) gracefully handles missing fields by leaving them out of PreFilledFields.
$comment-additional-properties: additionalProperties=true (NOT false) ‚Äî the wizard consumer is RESILIENT to extra fields per MatterPreFillService.ParseAiResponse (line 406-455): it tries direct schema first (HasAnyField check at line 477-481), then falls back to entity-extraction format ({entities[], keyValuePairs[]}), then to regex-based extraction. Setting additionalProperties=true preserves this resilience and matches the existing AiPreFillResult JsonSerializer.Deserialize behavior (System.Text.Json default UnmappedMemberHandling.Skip silently ignores extras). Tightening to additionalProperties=false here would break the existing fallback paths that handle entity-extraction-format responses from the LLM.
$comment-nullable-fields: All 7 string fields are nullable. AiPreFillResult declares each as 'string?' init-only. The Confidence number is also nullable (line 701-702). When the LLM emits a field, it can be either a string value or null/missing ‚Äî both are valid. The wizard's BuildPreFillResponse handles nulls by simply not adding the field to PreFilledFields (line 624-630).
$comment-property-order: Property declaration order matches the AiPreFillResult DTO declaration order (matterTypeName, practiceAreaName, matterName, matterDescription, assignedAttorneyName, assignedParalegalName, assignedOutsideCounselName, confidence). Unlike SUM-CHAT@v1 where declaration order is load-bearing for streaming UX, pre-fill is consumed as a single completed JSON object via PlaybookEventType.NodeCompleted (MatterPreFillService line 338-345) ‚Äî streaming order is not user-visible.
$comment-consumer-contract: Field names match EXACTLY the JsonPropertyName attributes on AiPreFillResult (camelCase). The useAiPrefill hook's fieldExtractor receives the parsed object and splits it into textFields + lookupFields (line 8-30 of useAiPrefill.ts JSDoc example). Matter wizard fieldExtractor maps: matterName‚Üíform.matterName, summary‚ÜêmatterDescription, matterTypeName‚ÜímatterType lookup, practiceAreaName‚ÜípracticeArea lookup, assignedAttorneyName‚ÜíContact lookup, etc.

matterTypeName.description: Suggested matter type display name (e.g., 'Litigation', 'Transactional', 'IP'). Resolved against sprk_mattertype Dataverse rows via findBestLookupMatch in the useAiPrefill hook (lookupResolvers.matterTypeName).

practiceAreaName.description: Suggested practice area display name (e.g., 'Commercial Litigation', 'Patent Prosecution'). Resolved against sprk_practicearea Dataverse rows via lookupResolvers.practiceAreaName.

matterName.description: Suggested matter name (e.g., 'Acme Corp v. Smith', 'XYZ Patent Application'). Direct text field ‚Äî no lookup resolution.

matterDescription.description: Suggested matter description / summary text. Mapped to the wizard's 'summary' form field in fieldExtractor (NOT matterDescription ‚Äî naming difference between AI output and form field is intentional per BuildPreFillResponse line 627).

assignedAttorneyName.description: Suggested lead attorney display name. Resolved against contact Dataverse rows via lookupResolvers.assignedAttorneyName (searchContactsAsLookup).

assignedParalegalName.description: Suggested paralegal display name. Resolved against contact Dataverse rows via lookupResolvers.assignedParalegalName.

assignedOutsideCounselName.description: Suggested outside counsel display name. Resolved against contact / account Dataverse rows via lookupResolvers.assignedOutsideCounselName.

confidence.description: Overall extraction confidence in [0.0, 1.0]. MatterPreFillService BuildPreFillResponse clamps to [0, 1] (line 632). When null, the per-node Confidence from PlaybookStreamEvent.NodeOutput.Confidence is used as fallback (line 344).
